html:
Monday, 7 July 2026

Social obligations ate most of the day, leaving only a narrow window for focused work. Output was limited, but the reading got done.

What got done

  • Finished Chapter 1 of Designing Data-Intensive Applications — system design prep underway
  • Published daily log entry to the daily-pulse site

In progress

  • Designing Data-Intensive Applications — Chapter 1 complete, rest of book ahead

Areas touched

  • System design study
  • Daily-pulse site

Sunday, July 6 2026

A setup day — new infrastructure laid down and a couple of loose ends caught up on, with budget work partially through.

What got done

  • Stood up the daily note infrastructure and wrote a startup notes doc
  • Initialized the daily-pulse-site repo and published logs for both July 6 and July 7 (with a correction replacing a misfiled 2026-07-07 entry)
  • Built the daily-pulse publisher tool, including support for an optional date argument to handle backdated entries
  • Caught up Bank of America transactions in the budget

In progress

  • American Express budget reconciliation started but not finished

Areas touched

  • Daily note / logging infrastructure
  • daily-pulse + daily-pulse-site tooling
  • Personal budget (Bank of America, American Express)
